Appearances:
Plaintiff, Caritas Management is present. Represented by Michalle Echervaria.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Eugene Jefferson, is present.
Attorney, Connie Sun , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-20-2010 is vacated.
